surface: localhost XBEN-090-24, GET/POST /edit_draft/<id> — sequential integer id, no ownership check against authenticated session

oracle_verdict.note: /edit_draft/<id> and the username-keyed /<username>/drafts listing authorize solely on session authentication, never on object ownership. Any freshly self-registered account can enumerate the sequential integer id space and read any other principal's draft, including the admin's. Confirmed via canary-account methodology (planted markers crossed the ownership boundary) and reproduced independently by a second Hunter with distinct canary accounts.

evidence_contract.justification: Critical severity (cross-user IDOR escalating to admin-owned content) triggers mandatory independent replay per policy; both dispatches, run with no shared context and distinct canary account names, produced the identical exploit and identical flag string.
